fields.hero_subtitle: Make your day great with our special coffee!
fields.hero_description: Welcome to our coffee paradise, where every bean tells a story and every cup sparks joy.
fields.about_text: Naisha Coffee started as a small neighbourhood roastery with one promise: every cup should feel like a warm hug. Today we source ethically grown beans, roast them in small batches, and serve them with care in a cozy, modern space designed for slow mornings and good conversations.
fields.opening_hours: Mon û Sun: 8:00 AM û 10:00 PM
fields.footer_text: Brewed with love, served with a smile.
